# UC-11.7.7 · Asterisk Voicemail Spool Growth and Storage Pressure

## Description

Voicemail spools on appliances fill quietly; exhaustion blocks new messages and breaks message-waiting indicators.

## Value

Avoids silent loss of regulated callbacks; pairs with OS disk checks for accuracy.

## Implementation

(1) Prefer host `df` metrics for truth; logs supplement. (2) Alert on growth rate and free space. (3) Automate retention policies.

## SPL

```spl
index=voip sourcetype="asterisk:messages" earliest=-30d
| where match(_raw, "(?i)voicemail|vm-?storage|saved.*message|spool")
| eval mb=tonumber(coalesce(vm_size_mb, size_mb, ""))
| timechart span=1d sum(mb) as est_message_mb sum(eval(1)) as vm_events
```

## Visualization

Line chart growth; overlay disk free from metrics index if present.
